text.value: Dates of death must be between today and the date of delivery
I'm very sorry for your loss
Name: Age: years, months, days Contact person: House number: Kitongoji:
Deliveries can be up to 3 months ago
Sympathise with the mother for her loss.
Mother suffered a miscarriage or stillbirth
What is the outcome of the pregnancy?
On the way to a healthcare facility

As a CHV, you are responsible for making sure that you are providing the community with health education and services while trying to take precautions to stop the transmission of Corona virus to one another. Therefore, make sure you consider the following while you conduct the visits: • Wash your hands with soap/sanitizer as many time as you can while at home, once you are at the client's house and when you leave. • Keep a 2 meters distance while talking to your clients. • Don't shake hands with your clients. • Avoid group gatherings. • Provide the service at the open space and if it should be inside, make sure the windows and doors are open. • Cover your mouth with a towel or elbow when you sneeze or cough. • Do not go for a visit if you have symptoms of fever, cough or frequent sneezing. • Please remember to do the covid education visit before or after submitting this form.
Precautionary measures when visiting a client
Was baby admitted to neonatal unit/special care area/hospital within the first 24 hours after birth?
Was the baby born preterm or too early?

Congratulations on the birth of your baby. Now, it is very important for you to take them to a healthcare facility in order to check you and your baby's health and for them to get the vaccines and other important services they need. You should go to the facility as soon as possible for this care – even today.
What was the method of delivery?
Since the birth of the child, have you and your baby gone to a healthcare facility for postnatal care?
Who was the main person who helped you deliver the baby?
No: Had difficulty breathing at birth or require resuscitation.
Yes: Cried immediately, no problem breathing.
Did the baby cry immediately after birth?
Cannot select "None of the above" with other options
Did the woman experience any of these major medical complications during this delivery?
Which facility did you deliver in?
On the way to a healthcare facility
What district was the facility in?
Did you deliver in a facility in Unguja or Pemba?
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Permanent household member - not planning to move elsewhere
Temporary household member - planning to move elsewhere soon
Does live in this household permanently, or are they here temporarily but later will leave?
Now I will register your child as a new household member. Please enter information for the member you would like to add.
Now I will register your children as new household members - I will ask the same set of questions for each, one by one
Ask the mother for the dates of death for each child that she has lost.
Did you deliver one baby or more than one baby
Delivery of between 2 and 4 babies is supported
How many babies did you deliver?
Enter a number between 0 and the total number of babies delivered
How many of the babies are alive?
How do you feel you were handled while you were at the health facility?
Were you asked to pay for delivery fees?
Were you asked to purchase any supplies?

I'd like to ask you a few questions about the quality of the services you received last time you went to the health facility. We will anonymously share this information with DHMT or other persons in the MOH so that they can improve the services that are provided. You can choose not to answer any question you don't want to. Is it ok for us to proceed?
Why do you feel you were handled badly?
Would you recommend your sister or relative to deliver at the same facility?
On the way to a healthcare facility
Between one thousand and ten thousand
Between ten thousand and twenty thousand
Between twenty thousand and fifty thousand
Yes: Cried immediately, no problem breathing.
No: Had difficulty breathing at birth or require resuscitation.
Mother suffered a miscarriage or stillbirth
On the way to a healthcare facility
Permanent household member - not planning to move elsewhere
Temporary household member - planning to move elsewhere soon
Tarehe ya kifo lazima iwe baina ya leo na tarehe aliozaliwa.
Pole sana kwa kupoteza mtoto wako.
Jina: Umri: miaka, miezi, siku Mtu wa karibu kwa mawasiliano: Namba ya nyumba: Kitongoji:
Aina ya tembeleo: Kurekodi matokeo ya ujauzito
Tarehe ya kujifungua iwe baina ya leo na miezi mitatu nyuma.
Mpe pole mama kwa kuharibika mimba yake.
Mimba imeharibika au mtoto kafa tumboni

Kama mhudumu wa afya ya jamii, una jukumu la kuhakikisha unatoa elimu ya afya ya jamii na huduma huku ukijikinga ili kuepusha kusambaa kwa maambukizi ya korona kutoka kwa mtu mmoja kwenda kwa mwengine. Hivyo hakikisha unazingatia yafuatayo wakati ukiwa unatoa huduma: • Osha mikono yako kwa maji na sabuni au kutumia vitakasa mikono mara nyingi kadiri unavyoweza ukiwa nyumbani kwako,nyumbani kwa mteja wako na pindi ukimaliza kutoa huduma. • Hakikisha kuna umbali wa mita mbili kati yako na mteja wako unayeenda kumtembelea • Pindi ukiongea na wateja wako , usishikane mikono. • Epuka mikusanyiko. • Toa huduma katika maeneo yaliyo wazi na ikitokea ukafanya ndani hakikisha milango na madirisha yanakuwa wazi. • Funika mdomo wako kwa kitambaa au kiwiko unavyooenda chafya au kukohoa. • Tafadhali usiende kutoa huduma ukijihisi na dalili za homa na kukohoa na kwenda chafya kwa wingi. • Tafadhali kumbuka kufungua fomu ya kuwaelimsiha wanakaya juu ya maambukizi ya korona na jinsi ya kuchukua tahadhari. Tembeleo kuhusu korona unaweza kulifanya kabla ya kuanza tembeleo lako au mara baada ya kumaliza tembeleo lako hili.
Hatua za kuchukua pindi unapoenda kumtembelea mteja wako
Je, mtoto aliwahi kulazwa hospital katika wodi maalum ya watoto wachanga ndani ya masaa 24 ya mwanzo baada ya kuzaliwa?
Je mtoto alifika muda wake wa kuzaliwa?

Hongera sana kwa kupata mtoto, Ila kwa sasa, ni muhimu sana kwenda nae (nao) katika kituo cha afya ili wewe na yeye (wao) mukachekiwe afya zenu, na mtoto/watoto kupata chanjo na huduma nyengine muhimu ambazo wanazihitaji. Na ni vizuri kwenda katika kituo cha afya haraka iwezekezekanavyo - hata leo hii.
Kujifungua kwa njia ya kawaida kwa msaada mtaalam wa afya
Kujifungua kwa msaada wa kuvutwa au kutumia vifaa tiba.
Tokea umzae mtoto wako, wewe na mtoto wako mumesha wahi kwenda kituo cha afya kupata huduma za baada ya kujifungua?
Nani muhusika mkuu aliekusaidia wakati ukimzaa mtoto wako?
Hapana: Alipata tatizo la upumuwaji alipozaliwa au alihitaji msaada wa kidaktari ili aweze kupumua
Ndio: Alilia punde tu baada ya kuzaliwa, na hakuwa na tatatizo la kupumua.
Je mtoto alilia punde tu baada ya kuzaliwa?
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua?
Je ulipata Maambukizi ( Homa kali baada tu ya kujifungua) ?
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi wakati wa kujifungua?
Je mtoto alichana msamba/njia ya uzazi kwa kiasi kikubwa ?
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua?
Kifafa cha mimba kabla ya kujifungua, Kifafa cha mimba or pressuere ya kupanda.
Je ulipata uchungu wa muda mrefu sana ?
Huwezi kuchaguwa "Hakuna moja wapo" na chaguo jengine
Je mama alipata matatizo makubwa ya kiafya muda mfupi baada ya kujifungua?
Ni kituo gani cha afya ulichojifungulia?
Kituo cha afya ulichojifungua kipo katika wilaya gani?
Ulijifungua katika kituo cha afya kilichopo Unguja au Pemba?
Ni lipi jina lake la kwanza?
Ni lipi jina la babu yake?
Ni lipi jina la baba yake?
Mkaazi wa kudumu - Hatohamia sehemu nyengine
Mkaazi wa muda - Atahamia sehemu nyengine
Je ni mkazi wa kudumu katika nyumba hii au ni mkazi wa muda tu?
Sasa nitamsajili mtoto wako kama mwanafamilia mpya kwa nyumba hii.
Sasa nitamsajili watoto wako kama mwanafamilia mpya kwa nyumba hii - Nitakuuliza maswali yenye kufanana kwa kila mtoto, mmoja mmoja.
Muombe mama tarehe za kifo cha kila mtoto aliefariki.
Je umejifungua mtoto mmoja au zaidi ya mtoto mmoja?
Tafadhali ingiza idadi kati ya 2 na 4.
Ingiza nambari baina ya 0 na jumla ya watoto waliozaliwa.
Ulipokelewa vipi ulipofika kituo cha afya?
Je, ulitakiwa ulipie pesa kwajili ya kujifungua?
Je ulitakiwa kununua kifaa chochote kwajili ya kujifungua?
Ningependa kukuuliza maswali machache kuhusu ubora wa huduma ulizopata katika kipindi cha mwisho ulipokwenda kituo cha Afya. Tutapeleka maoni yako bila ya kukutaja jina lako.
Je utamshauri dada yako au ndugu yako wa karibu kujifungulia katika kituo hicho?
Hospitali ya wilaya ya Abdalla Mzee
Kati ya shilingi elfu na shilingi elfu kumi
Kati ya shilingi elfu kumi na shilingi elfu ishirini
Kati ya shilingi elfu ishirini na shilingi elfu hamsini
Ndio: Alilia punde tu baada ya kuzaliwa, na hakuwa na tatatizo la kupumua.
Hapana: Alipata tatizo la upumuwaji alipozaliwa au alihitaji msaada wa kidaktari ili aweze kupumua
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi kabla ya kujifungua?
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi wakati wa kujifungua?
Je ulitokwa na damu nyingi baada ya kujifungua?
Kifafa cha mimba kabla ya kujifungua, Kifafa cha mimba or pressuere ya kupanda.
Je ulipata Maambukizi ( Homa kali baada tu ya kujifungua) ?
Je ulipata uchungu wa muda mrefu sana ?
Je mtoto alichana msamba/njia ya uzazi kwa kiasi kikubwa ?
Kujifungua kwa njia ya kawaida kwa msaada mtaalam wa afya
Kujifungua kwa msaada wa kuvutwa au kutumia vifaa tiba.
Mimba imeharibika au mtoto kafa tumboni
Mkaazi wa kudumu - Hatohamia sehemu nyengine
Mkaazi wa muda - Atahamia sehemu nyengine

bind.relevant: selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"north_a") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"north_b") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"central") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"south") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"west_a") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"west_b") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"urban") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"chakechake") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"micheweni") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"mkoani") or selected( /pregnancy_outcomes/delivery_location_assessment/facility_district ,"wete")
